tests.assessment: The regression suite passed locally, but the corrective tests do not assert scenario-specific evidence for S06-S08, S13-S14, complete S12 evidence, or complete Draft 2020-12 schemas. Passing tests therefore do not validate the benchmark conclusions.

positive_findings: Codex preserved the prior local work in a checkpoint commit before merging the remote handoff
No amend, force push, main merge, stage transition or production core switch was performed
Static scenarioStatusForCandidate logic and copy-only S01 success were removed
CurrentNodeXmlAdapter now overrides the common contract methods
S01 is honestly unsupported, S02 failed, S03-S05 unsupported and S09-S11 blocked rather than falsely passed
S05 is named and selected as the support-2 second one-by-one table
Benchmark-002 artifacts, test logs and report are committed and pushed
The report correctly declares completion_gate_passed false, codex_execution_status partial, core_selection prohibited and stage_transition prohibited

critical_findings.finding: Each scenario only runs extractSemanticSnapshot on the unchanged source document and asserts package validity. The runner then sets non-target, merged-table, image, BinData, fwSpace and namespace preservation flags to true solely because the adapter status is passed. There is no candidate mutation output and no before/after scenario-specific snapshot comparison.
critical_findings.required_correction: Remove automatic preservation=true assignment. Create real before/after snapshots around an actual candidate output or mark these scenarios unsupported/blocked/failed until scenario-specific preservation comparisons exist.

critical_findings.finding: S13 and S14 call openPackage/validatePackage and pass because the HWPX package is valid. S13 has no clean offline installation evidence. S14 has null license path/hash/SPDX and redistribution_assessment unknown, yet is reported passed.
critical_findings.required_correction: S13 must require a clean-environment offline installation command, exit code, artifact inventory and runtime network test. S14 must require actual LICENSE/COPYING/NOTICE files, hashes and redistribution assessment; otherwise mark blocked or failed.

critical_findings.finding: S12 contains real repeated analyzeDocument duration and RSS samples, but the scenario also requires candidate artifact size and runtime/dependency installation size. Those measurements are absent or represented as zero, so a full passed status overstates the evidence.
critical_findings.required_correction: Add artifact/runtime/install size evidence and a defensible process peak-memory method, or mark S12 failed/blocked with the timing samples retained as partial evidence.

critical_findings.finding: The functional-fit score is still calculated from currentPassed multiplied by two. Renaming the formula and changing the multiplier does not make it evidence based. Invalid S06-S08 and S13-S14 passes directly inflate the score to 12 points.
critical_findings.required_correction: Define explicit scenario-to-category rubrics with maximum points and evidence gates. A scenario contributes points only when its scenario-specific evidence validator passes.

critical_findings.finding: Only benchmark-result and benchmark-summary schemas were committed, and both validate only top-level required fields plus schema/task constants. Required adapter-execution, dependency-license-offline-manifest and test-summary schemas are absent, and nested types/enums/patterns are not enforced.
critical_findings.required_correction: Implement all five Task Contract schemas with nested Draft 2020-12 constraints and run a real schema validator against every committed JSON artifact.

critical_findings.finding: External candidate and COM blocked records contain planned or placeholder command strings, but stdout/stderr are null and no command execution log proves the commands were attempted. COM records explicitly say the wrapper was not executed while listing attempted commands.
critical_findings.required_correction: Separate planned_commands from attempted_commands. Only populate attempted_commands after process execution and attach exit code/stdout/stderr. Otherwise record prerequisite_not_checked or blocked_without_execution and do not present it as evidence-backed attempted execution.

critical_findings.finding: The corpus manifest contains original and v2-v5 but no v1 fixture and no explicit v1 missing record, despite the Task Contract requirement.
critical_findings.required_correction: Add v1 as available or as an explicit missing entry with searched paths and reason.

critical_findings.finding: The committed write-permission evidence records only the successful elevated probe. The claimed initial Access Denied command, exit code and error text are not preserved.
critical_findings.required_correction: Record both the failed normal-permission attempt and the successful elevated attempt, or state that the original error text is unavailable.

valid_findings: S01 copy-only save is no longer treated as success
S12 includes real repeated timing samples

python_hwpx.reason: No pinned artifact, actual LICENSE, clean offline install or real Python process execution. Blocked records contain placeholder commands without execution logs.

hwpxlib.reason: No pinned jar/source, actual LICENSE, clean offline install or independent Java process execution.

hwpforge.reason: Project identity, immutable source, actual LICENSE, runtime/build and process execution remain unestablished.

met_items: corrective commits and push exist remotely
prior local work was preserved before remote merge
static status lookup and copy-only S01 success were removed
full local Node test suite was run and logs committed
benchmark-002 output and report directories exist
production core switch, stage transition and user visual review remain prohibited
unmet_items: complete S12 performance and installation-size evidence
valid S13 clean offline installation evidence
valid S14 actual license and redistribution evidence
pinned python-hwpx artifact and actual process execution
pinned hwpxlib artifact and independent Java execution
HwpForge identity and actual process or truly evidence-backed blocker
actual Hancom COM execution and page measurements
S05 second one-by-one table before/after height evidence
all five detailed Draft 2020-12 schemas and actual schema validation
v1 fixture or explicit missing record
internally accurate report scenario counts and scorecard

master_review_reasons: The corrective benchmark still contains synthetic or under-evidenced passed scenarios that could mislead the HWPX core selection decision
The current scorecard is inflated by invalid passes and must not be used for architecture selection
A further corrective iteration is required before deciding whether task 002 remains open or is followed by a task 003 contract
next_prompt_intent: Do not transition stage or select a core. Preserve commits 70708db, e1e6504, 22d5162 and d666bb6 as evidence. In a new corrective iteration, first add failing tests for S06-S08 auto-preservation, S13/S14 package-valid substitution, incomplete S12, missing schemas, count-based scoring and placeholder attempted commands. Then regenerate benchmark-002 results with invalid passes downgraded, implement scenario-specific evidence validators, acquire and execute pinned external candidates as already master-approved, run actual Hancom COM, and regenerate an internally consistent report and scorecard.
notes: The reported task execution is legitimately partial, not completed. Do not ask the user for visual review because no valid candidate mutation plus COM-resaved output exists.
